message:
✨ Migrate 10 dashboards to unified DashboardPage component (#471)

* ✨ Migrate 8 dashboards to unified DashboardPage component

Migrated dashboards with significant code reduction:
- Alerts.tsx: Simplified with DashboardPage wrapper
- Nodes.tsx: Moved from custom layout to DashboardPage
- Logs.tsx: Consolidated with DashboardPage pattern
- Pods.tsx: 540→229 LOC, keeps custom pod issues list as children
- Deployments.tsx: 434→125 LOC, preserves cached stats pattern
- Compliance.tsx: 429→150 LOC, keeps mock posture calculation
- Storage.tsx: 620→291 LOC, keeps PVC modal as external component
- Cost.tsx: 483→203 LOC, preserves provider pricing logic

All dashboards now use:
- Unified DnD handling via DashboardPage
- createMergedStatValueGetter for stats
- Consistent loading/refreshing states
- Standard emptyState configuration

Total reduction: ~1,500 LOC removed from 8 files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Migrate HelmReleases and DataCompliance to DashboardPage

- HelmReleases.tsx: 387→81 lines (79% reduction)
- DataCompliance.tsx: 414→135 lines (67% reduction)
- DashboardPage: Add isDemoData prop for demo dashboards

Both dashboards now use the unified DashboardPage component,
removing duplicated DnD, modal, and header code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
